sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107205" key="u(perai/mwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπεραίμ-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n107205.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">over-fullness of blood,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:209" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.209</biblScope> </bibl> (wrongly interred, instead of <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπεραίμ-ησις</orth>, from foreg.).</sense> </entryFree>
